Hero.subline: Branding, websites and paid traffic for companies that want to be big.

steps.title: 01. Immersion & Diagnosis
steps.desc: We dive into your business: product, audience, competition, goals. Without this step, the rest is guesswork.

steps.title: 02. Strategy
steps.desc: We define positioning, core message, audience awareness and KPIs. All written down before turning into pixels or ads.

steps.title: 03. Creative Direction
steps.desc: Moodboards, references, aesthetic and tone choices. Approval here prevents rework in execution.

steps.title: 04. Execution
steps.desc: Brand design, website development or campaign creation. Iteration with you along the way, not only at the end.

steps.title: 05. Delivery & Follow-up
steps.desc: Final files, deploy, campaign activation, usage guidelines. Follow-up of the first results.

About.name: Who is Leonardo Ferreira
About.p1: Hi! I'm Leonardo, specialist in digital marketing.
About.p2: Over 6 years in the creative market, working on brands, websites and campaigns that need to look big from the first interaction with the audience.
About.p3: I work with method. Every deliverable, a brand, a website, a campaign or a content piece, goes through strategy, creation and follow-up. Design is part of it; results are what matter, and results come from consistent, repeated and measured execution.
About.quote: "Simplicity is subtracting the obvious and adding the meaningful." – John Maeda

Deliverables.title: What is included in the visual identity project?

items.title: Complete Logo
items.desc: Flexible and organized files (PDF, PNG, SVG, EPS) in RGB for digital use and CMYK for printing, including Pantone codes.

items.title: Visual Ecosystem
items.desc: All supporting elements that make the identity unique: graphics, textures, patterns, secondary typography, and technical color palette.

items.title: Prototyping and Mockups
items.desc: Visualization of your brand in the real world. Applications on advertising materials, digital assets, uniforms, and stationery, as defined in the briefing.

items.title: Brand Guidelines
items.desc: The ultimate guide to your brand (Brandbook). A detailed document standardizing the correct use of all visual elements to ensure consistency across any application.

CTA.title:
Ready to take your company
to the next level?
CTA.desc: Fill the request so I can understand the project goals and challenges, and then we schedule a conversation to align everything. Or send an email directly to:

projeto-mademax.description: MADEMAX is a manufacturer of steel sheet tiles and thermoacoustic tiles.
projeto-mademax.challenge: The MADEMAX club sets a new standard for sport shooting in Brazil, combining respect for the sport's traditions with high-performance infrastructure and tactical sophistication.
projeto-mademax.solution: The visual identity was designed to project absolute precision and exclusivity, using a central symbol that resembles a crosshair and the convergence of traditional values. Through a palette combining deep authority blue with tactical precision orange, the brand communicates security, technical rigor, and prestige. The design positions MADEMAX not just as a shooting club, but as a seal of excellence for those seeking technical mastery in an environment of absolute trust and sporting heritage.

projeto-biothera.description: Biothera operates in the natural health and aesthetics segment.
projeto-biothera.challenge: Specializing in biological solutions for agribusiness, Biothera combines the power of nature with the efficiency of sustainable management.
projeto-biothera.solution: The logo merges the symbol of 'energy/power' with botanical elements, symbolizing the activation of life and productivity in the field. The visual identity communicates balance and biological innovation, establishing Biothera as a benchmark in sustainability and agricultural technology.

projeto-divinocar.description: Divino Car operates in the automotive sector.
projeto-divinocar.challenge: Divino Car redefines the concept of an automotive workshop, elevating trust and personalized care to the status of a brand differentiator.
projeto-divinocar.solution: The visual identity uses a sporty aesthetic and dynamic typography to convey speed and technical excellence, while the color palette brings a modern and welcoming energy. The result is a strong brand that breaks away from industry clichés, focusing on the customer's experience and safety.

projeto-proconsult.description: ProConsult operates in construction management and consulting.
projeto-proconsult.challenge: ProConsult was born to transform the operational reality of SMEs, structuring processes that reduce direct dependence on the founder and restore clarity to the business.
projeto-proconsult.solution: The visual identity was designed to convey solidity and fluidity, using a palette of sober tones and a symbol that refers to connection and continuity. The result is a brand that projects authority and predictability, essential for a consultancy that promises organization and strategic freedom to its clients.

projeto-hellobim.description: Hello BIM operates in the architecture and compatibilization area.
projeto-hellobim.challenge: Hello BIM emerged to democratize the teaching of the BIM methodology, transforming a complex technical process into something practical and accessible.
projeto-hellobim.solution: The brand's design is modular and architectural, reflecting the very essence of digital construction. Through vibrant visual communication and block typography, the brand positions itself as the gateway for professionals seeking technological mastery in modern architecture.

projeto-raxseguros.description: RAX operates with insurance and heritage protection.
projeto-raxseguros.challenge: As a brokerage focused on the corporate sector and large-scale fleets, RAX Seguros requires an image of absolute protection and scale.
projeto-raxseguros.solution: The visual identity uses a geometric shield icon and high-contrast colors to convey vigilance and precision. The rebranding reinforces RAX's capacity to offer tailored solutions for large corporations, transforming risk management into a strategic and secure process.

projeto-polysantos.challenge: The Poly Santos office specializes in modular architecture, where timeless aesthetics meet constructive efficiency.
projeto-polysantos.solution: The visual identity was built on minimalist lines that form a solid structure, symbolizing the union between luxury design and functionality. The brand communicates sophistication and precision, reflecting the office's mission to realize dreams through intelligent and innovative projects.

projeto-ecomove.description: Ecomove is a startup focused on electric mobility and sustainability.
projeto-ecomove.challenge: ecomove emerges to lead the revolution of sustainable urban mobility, offering electric scooters and bicycles that redefine movement in cities, making it clean, efficient, and inclusive.
projeto-ecomove.solution: The visual identity was designed to convey tactile energy and conscious fluidity, using a unique color palette combining sustainability green with innovative purple and sky blue. The central symbol is an 'eM' emblem organically fusing the shape of a heart with the stroke of an electric arc, symbolizing care for the planet and the activation of urban life.

projeto-remachcapital.description: Remach Capital operates in financial advisory and M&A.
projeto-remachcapital.challenge: Remach Capital operates in the financial protection and insurance sector, where trust and ethics are fundamental pillars.
projeto-remachcapital.solution: The identity was developed to translate clarity and security, using robust geometric shapes and a technological blue palette that communicates seriousness and real tracking. The design positions Remach as a consultative and approachable brand, capable of simplifying complex decisions for its clients.

projeto-p1marketing.description: Website of a performance agency in Uberlândia — racing aesthetics, dark identity with neon green.
projeto-p1marketing.challenge: Translate the 'pole position' concept into a web experience that communicated speed, performance and technical sophistication.
projeto-p1marketing.solution: Full Next.js site with scroll-driven hero, frame sequence, racing palette (ink + neon green), Syncopate typography. Custom cursor, 3.2.1.GO loader, performant and responsive animations.

projeto-forset.description: Forset's institutional website — clean and modern design to present services clearly.
projeto-forset.challenge: Build a solid digital presence that conveyed technical credibility while remaining accessible to the end client.
projeto-forset.solution: Institutional website built with Next.js, focused on performance and technical SEO. Clean editorial structure, strong typographic hierarchy and strategic CTAs in each section.

projeto-airjordan.description: Conceptual portfolio inspired by Air Jordan — 3D sticky stack, organic cards, scroll-driven animations.
projeto-airjordan.challenge: Technically prove how much rich animation and interactivity is possible without compromising performance.
projeto-airjordan.solution: 3D sticky stack with real perspective, organic cards with organic hover, optimized GSAP transitions, variable fonts and LCP below 1.2s. Showcase of what's possible in top-tier webdesign.

projeto-pokemon.description: Landing page tribute to the first Pokémon movie — cinematic visual narrative, lens reveal, starfield parallax.
projeto-pokemon.challenge: Create a cinematic and emotional experience around an iconic property without falling into fan-site clichés.
projeto-pokemon.solution: Lens reveal in the hero, layered starfield parallax, scroll storytelling with cinematic timing, classic typography and minimal UI to give protagonism to the artwork.

projeto-gcarneiro.description: Professional site for a premium office — refined identity and straightforward UX.
projeto-gcarneiro.challenge: Communicate authority and trust of a premium office in a clean digital format, without visual excess.
projeto-gcarneiro.solution: Refined identity with sober palette, classic typography and editorial layout. Straightforward UX with clear conversion hierarchy and well-crafted technical SEO.

projeto-nalupoke.description: Poke bowls shop in Uberlândia, with interactive digital menu and youthful identity.
projeto-nalupoke.challenge: Build digital presence for a food service that needed to stand out in an increasingly saturated poke house market.
projeto-nalupoke.solution: Next.js site with interactive menu, vibrant product photos, WhatsApp integration for orders, and a youthful visual identity that speaks directly to the audience. Performance, mobile-first and local SEO crafted to compete in searches like 'poke uberlândia'.

Pillars.title: We deliver a brand consistent from logo to last pixel.

items.title: Branding
items.desc: Complete visual identity: naming, logo, palette, typography, visual system and brand guidelines. So you look serious.

items.title: Websites
items.desc: High-performance sites and landing pages in Next.js. Design, code and deploy. Multi-language when needed.

items.title: Paid traffic
items.desc: Meta Ads and Google Ads campaigns to attract, convert and scale. Strategy, creatives and ongoing optimization.

items.title: Graphic design
items.desc: Posts, carousels and stories for Instagram and LinkedIn. Consistent visual direction aligned with your brand, ready to publish.

items.title: Video editing
items.desc: Reels, VSLs, institutional videos and ads. Cuts, motion, color and captions — delivered ready to post on every platform.

items.title: AI automations
items.desc: Automated WhatsApp support and active prospecting with AI. Your team closes; AI handles the volume.

items.title: Social media
items.desc: Content planning, editorial calendar, publishing and engagement. Your presence on social, without gaps.

items.title: Copywriting
items.desc: Copy for websites, ads, emails and scripts. Text that sells, no clichés, in your brand's voice.
